PreToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\-\-no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not skip git hooks (--no-verify). Fix the underlying issue instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'push.*--force.*main|push.*-f.*main'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never force push to main.' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.command: if [ -f index.html ]; then LINES=$(wc -l < index.html); if [ "$LINES" -gt 4500 ]; then echo "WARNING: index.html is $LINES lines. Consider extracting into modules." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0
